name: Cream of Celery Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine celery and boiling water. Cover and simmer until the celery is tender.
2. Brown onion in butter or margarine.
3. Add flour to the onion mixture and mix until smooth.
4. Gradually add the scalded milk, stirring constantly.
5. Cook over hot water until the sauce is smooth and thick.
6. Stir in the cooked celery and its cooking liquid.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Heat thoroughly before serving.
